arts.sum: In 2017, Paris Saint-Germain welcomed two top players, Neymar Jr. and Kylian Mbappé, as the capital club had an ambitious approach to winning the UEFA Champions League. The 32-year-old went on to make 173 appearances across all competitions, scoring 118 goals and recording 73 assists. arts.ttl: Neymar says Mbappé 'jealous' of Messi at PSG
arts.sum: Brazil striker Neymar said his former Paris Saint-Germain teammate Kylian Mbappé became "a little jealous" after superstar Lionel Messi joined the French club in August 2021 in a free transfer.

arts.ttl: Man Utd Reject £40M Napoli Bid for Tottenham, PSG-Linked Talent
arts.sum: Rúben Amorim’s decision to leave Alejandro Garnacho out of last month’s Manchester derby has fueled growing speculation about his future at Manchester United. According to the Daily Mail, Garnacho is no longer seen as “untouchable” at the club, with several top European teams, including Bayern Munich, Paris Saint-Germain, AC Milan, Real Madrid, and Barcelona, reportedly […] The post Man Utd Reject £40M Napoli Bid for Tottenham, PSG-Linked Talent appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Neymar says Mbappé was jealous of Messi in Paris, adds that player egos hurt PSG's performances
arts.sum: Striker Neymar said his former Paris Saint-Germain teammate Kylian Mbappé became “a little jealous” after superstar Lionel Messi joined the French club in August 2021 in a free transfer. Speaking in a podcast hosted by World Cup winner Romário released Thursday, the 32-year-old Brazilian who plays for Saudi club Al-Hilal added that big egos affected the performances of PSG in big matches.

arts.ttl: Juventus’ Vision Unfolds After Beating Tottenham for £50M-Rated PSG Outcast
arts.sum: Randal Kolo Muani’s future at Paris Saint-Germain has been a key talking point since the January transfer window opened, with growing speculation about a possible departure. After days of rumors, the French forward is now set to join Juventus, having turned down an offer from Tottenham.
